title: Elytra/Chestplate Swapper (Fabric)
description: A simple quality of life mod that swaps between chestplate and elytra on a keystroke.
body: [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/473125?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/elytra-chestplate-swapper) ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/elytra-chestplate-swapper?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth) ![GitHub Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Saphjyr/ElytraChestplateSwapper2?style=for-the-badge) ## Description A simple quality of life mod that swaps between chestplate and elytra on a keystroke. ## How to use it The default key is "grave accent" ("²" on the AZERTY layout) but it can be changed in the options of the game. It can be triggered outside of the inventory and inside too. ## Requirements This mod requires the Fabric API. [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api) ## Disclaimer Some public servers do not allow this kind of mods and can detect them if it is used in some circumstances (spam the key, swap while pressing a movement key). You should check the server's rules before using it on a public server. I am not responsible for the consequences of inappropriate use of this mod.
